nodes.label: AI as task-specific tool
nodes.label_negative: AI as ineffective for broad, unconstrained tasks
nodes.grounding_span: AI is not generally useful yet for many tasks. I feel it is currently only effective when given relatively narrowly constrained tasks.

nodes.label: AI reliability for practical tasks
nodes.grounding_span: the output would probably not be useful... contained unusable information (hallucinated web addresses, for instance)

nodes.label: AI integration into existing software
nodes.grounding_span: Often the limitation is integration. I need to integrate our systems... with the LLM in order for it to handle the work.

nodes.label: AI as collaborative partner
nodes.grounding_span: When coding I work collaboratively with the AI, sometimes asking it to write something for me, sometimes asking question about the code

nodes.label: AI integration into workflow
nodes.grounding_span: The content generation tasks I have placed in an automated workflow so there isn't any interaction

nodes.label: Management enthusiasm for AI
nodes.grounding_span: management is very gung-ho about implementing AI... staff is concerned about potential errors

nodes.label: Belief in AI capability improvement over time
nodes.grounding_span: even if they don't work today because of model limitations, 6 months from now those limitations may not exist

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: it can be faster to explain the code I want than to think about it and type it manually

nodes.label: Accuracy and reliability
nodes.grounding_span: the output would probably not be useful... contained unusable information

nodes.label: Autonomy and personal control
nodes.grounding_span: I just go off on my own

nodes.label: Frustration with management's unrealistic expectations
nodes.grounding_span: This was a very frustrating situation.

nodes.label: Openness to increasing AI use in future
nodes.grounding_span: I can't really think of many tasks that I would not delegate to AI if I thought it could effectively handle them.

nodes.label: Skepticism and caution toward AI
nodes.grounding_span: AI is not generally useful yet for many tasks.

nodes.label: Optimism about AI as future tool
nodes.grounding_span: 6 months from now those limitations may not exist

nodes.label: Proactive automation and system-building
nodes.grounding_span: I have developed a web app which uses an LLM API and web scraping tools to do this, in order to streamline the process.

nodes.label: Pragmatic expectation-setting based on experience
nodes.grounding_span: I agreed to set up an AI to check pricing and send an email, giving the caveat that initially this would be just to demonstrate where the technology is at and that the output would probably not be useful.
